case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. THONE L AMAT ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMAT, THONE L $1,314.60 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,579.60, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66492957) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT AMAT, THONE L DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2021

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210007194) AS TO DEFENDANT AMAT, THONE L
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMAT, THONE L

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2022 CONTINUED TO JUL-26-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AMAT, THONE L

DECLARATION RE: 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 210007194) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210007194) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
